topic: What percentage of teens say they want to start a business
caption:
More than half of teens already want to build something of their own.
The gap isn't ambition. It's knowing where to start.
HustleUp gives your teen real skills, real steps, and their first real earnings.
See how it works → hustleup.us

alt_text: A bold graphic displaying the statistic that 54 percent of teens say they want to start a business, with the HustleUp branding and website URL hustleup.us at the bottom.

copy.headline: of teens say they want to start a business
